typically_loved: Foam targets are easier to match to a foam-specific search intent.
Buyers often prefer foam targets for easier arrow stopping and removal.
Foam target options are widely available across common backyard archery sizes.
common_complaints: Density and durability can vary a lot between foam targets.
Some buyers may need to double-check draw-weight compatibility before buying.
Dimensions and portability can be different from what product photos suggest.
separates_good_vs_bad: Prioritize true foam construction instead of straw or woven targets.
Check target dimensions and expected bow compatibility before buying.
Look for products that clearly match foam-target use rather than generic archery accessories.
